login.title: Sign In
login.createAccount: Create your personal account to access all the features of the platform
login.invalid-credentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.

sign-up.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
sign-up.error-creating-account: Could not create the account. Check your details and try again.

plans-page.checkout-error: Could not start Mercado Pago checkout.
plans-page.no-account: No active account. Please sign in again.
plans-page.success-pending: Payment is processing. Your plan will activate shortly.
plans-page.cancel-message: The payment was cancelled or rejected. You can try again from Plans.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.delete_confirm: ¿Estás seguro de que deseas eliminar este almacén? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
warehouses.emptyDescription: You can create a new warehouse by clicking the button below.
warehouses.error-message: You have already created a warehouse with the same name or address.
warehouses.limitMessage: You are using {current} of {max} allowed warehouses.
warehouses.search-placeholder: Search by name, city, or address…

components.complete-data: Complete all fields in the form
components.edit-data: You can edit the data in the form

errors.postal-code-required: The postal code field is required.

dashboard.empty-products: No fruits registered yet. Go to Warehouses to set up your inventory.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.no-content: Everything in order. No products require restocking.
alerts.no-content-description: You can add products to the inventory by clicking the button below.
alerts.no-expired: Everything in order. No expired products.
alerts.no-expired-description: You can adjust the days in advance for expiration alerts.

orders.title: Orders
orders.no-access-lede: Your account cannot access purchases or orders. Only fruit store owner or supplier profiles can use this section.

products.title: Products
products.emptyDescription: You can create a new product by clicking the button below.
products.name: Name
products.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
products.empty-description: You can create a new product by clicking the button below.
products.duplicate-product: A product with this name already exists.
products.save-error: Could not save the product. Check the details and try again.
products.limitMessage: You are using {current} of {max} allowed products.
products.search-placeholder: Search by name, brand, or fruit type…

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.name: Name
inventory.valid-date: You must enter a valid date.
inventory.stock-reduced-error: You cannot reduce stock below zero.
inventory.confirm-delete-product: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
inventory.delete-product-current-stock: You cannot delete a product that has stock.
inventory.error-past-date: You cannot add stock with a past date.
inventory.search-placeholder: Search by name, fruit type, or ID…
inventory.search-no-results: No inventory products match your search.
inventory.transfer-dialog-hint: {count} selected product(s) will be transferred. This is a simulation (no API).
inventory.transfer-select-products: Select at least one product in the table.
inventory.transfer-no-targets: No other warehouse is available. Demo destinations will be used.
inventory.transfer-error-no-destinations: No destination warehouse is available (including demo).

Detecta y clasifica objetos con intelige: Detect and classify objects with artificial intelligence
Arrastra una imagen aquí o haz clic para: Drag an image here or click to select
Presiona \"Iniciar Reconocimiento\" para: Press "Start Recognition" to access your webcam
El modelo de inteligencia artificial ana: The AI model will analyze what the camera sees
Verás predicciones en tiempo real en el: You'll see real-time predictions on the right side
Presiona \"Capturar y Guardar\" para gua: Press "Capture and Save" to save a prediction
Accede a tu historial en cualquier momen: Access your history at any time
Asegúrate de tener buena iluminación: Make sure you have good lighting
Posiciona el objeto directamente frente: Position the object directly in front of the camera
